title: Amtech XXSEL015 50mm Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 50mm padlock has a corrosion resistant brass plated body and a 6mm hardened steel shackle
VERSATILE: Supplied with 3 keys, it is ideal for a wide range of security applications
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Padlock See more
